name: stop-the-bus
description: Multiplayer word game - Stop the Bus

scripts.setup: cp apps/server/.env.example apps/server/.env && cp apps/mobile/.env.example apps/mobile/.env
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=@stop-the-bus/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace=@stop-the-bus/server && tsc --noEmit -p apps/mobile/tsconfig.json
scripts.build:server: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace=@stop-the-bus/server
scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:mobile
